entry.title: New: RES26-076 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL AND RELATED EXPENSES, VALUED AT $4,000, TO THE CITY FROM THE WORLD HEALTH ORGANIZATION FOR THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR OF THE OFFICE OF CLIMATE CHANGE, SUSTAINABILITY AND RESILIENCY TO ATTEND THE 2025 WORLD HEALTH ORGANIZATION GLOBAL SUMMIT ON TRADITIONAL MEDICINE IN NEW DELHI, INDIA, FROM DECEMBER 14 TO DECEMBER 21, 2025.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
